Use this workflow only when the user explicitly asks for it or explicitly invokes this command.

Required order:

1. Explore context.
2. Clarify one question at a time.
3. Compare approaches and recommend one.
4. Write and confirm a design in `docs/superpowers/specs/`.
5. Write the implementation plan in `docs/superpowers/plans/`.
6. Implement with failing test first.
7. Run fresh verification before completion.
